# AgentAegis

> Pay-per-call cybersecurity workflows for AI agents. AgentAegis wraps battle-tested open-source security engines and threat-intelligence APIs behind a unified MCP server with two payment rails — pre-funded API key, or per-call USDC micropayments via the x402 protocol on Base mainnet.

## What we are

AgentAegis is a hosted Model Context Protocol (MCP) server exposing 22 cybersecurity tools that any AI agent — Claude, GPT, custom agent — can invoke as part of a conversation. Tools are billed per call ($0.10–$2.00 typical, free tier for discovery).

## What we are NOT

We did not build the scanning engines. We are an integration and billing layer over open-source tools.

## What we wrap (the scanning engines)

- nmap (network discovery, GPLv2)
- Nuclei (web vulnerability scanning, MIT)
- sslyze (SSL/TLS analysis, AGPL-3.0)
- Semgrep CE (static code analysis, LGPL-2.1)
- trufflehog (secret scanning, AGPL-3.0)
- trivy (dependency and container audit, Apache-2.0)

## Threat intelligence APIs we call

- NVD (NIST National Vulnerability Database — CVE catalog)
- AbuseIPDB (IP reputation)
- AlienVault OTX (threat indicators)
- abuse.ch (URLhaus, Feodo Tracker — malware/botnet IOCs)
- Have I Been Pwned (breach data)

## What we built (the proprietary layer)

- Dual-rail billing engine — API key with monthly budget OR per-call USDC via x402
- Body-inspection gating — URL-based gateways break under MCP's multiplexed JSON-RPC
- Unified rail-discriminator usage log
- MCP integration that makes the open-source engines callable from any MCP-compatible agent
- Customer self-service portal at app.agentaegis.org
- Patent pending — US provisional 64/057,021 (filed 2026-05-04) on the dual-rail + gating architecture

## 22 tools across 6 categories

### Compliance and GRC (5 tools)
- compliance_framework_check — posture against SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, PCI DSS, NIST CSF
- evidence_collect — generate evidence collection plans for audit controls
- control_gap_analysis — prioritized remediation roadmap with effort estimates
- audit_report_generate — audit-ready compliance reports
- policy_generate — tailored security policies (incident response, access control, etc.)

### Vulnerability Management (5 tools)
- vuln_scan_network — scan IPs/domains for open ports, services, vulnerabilities
- vuln_scan_web_app — Nuclei-powered web application vulnerability scanning
- vuln_prioritize — risk-based prioritization across CVE findings
- cve_lookup — CVE detail lookup via NVD (CVSS, affected packages, references)
- ssl_tls_audit — sslyze-powered SSL/TLS configuration audit

### Code Security (3 tools)
- sast_scan — Semgrep-powered static code analysis
- secret_scan — trufflehog-powered secret detection in repositories
- dependency_audit — trivy-powered dependency vulnerability audit

### Blue Team and Threat Intel (4 tools)
- incident_triage — structured incident analysis and prioritization
- threat_intel_lookup — IP/domain reputation across AbuseIPDB, OTX, abuse.ch
- dns_security_check — DNS configuration and security analysis
- email_security_audit — DMARC, SPF, DKIM validation

### Identity and Access (2 tools)
- access_review — access control audit and review
- mfa_audit — MFA configuration audit

### Offensive (1 tool)
- credential_check — HIBP-powered breach exposure check

### Account (2 free tools)
- help — agent-facing FAQ
- account_balance — query prepaid balance and recent usage

## Payment rails

### API key
- Issued at signup at agentaegis.org/pay (Stripe-funded top-up, $5 minimum)
- Sent as Bearer token in Authorization header
- Server debits prepaid balance atomically per call
- Monthly budget cap per key

### x402 USDC micropayments
- HTTP 402 challenge with payment requirements (network base, asset USDC, EIP-712 domain)
- Agent signs ERC-3009 transferWithAuthorization (gasless from payer)
- Server forwards signed payload to facilitator for /verify + /settle
- On-chain settlement on Base mainnet, median ~3 seconds end-to-end
- No signup required for the agent

## Pricing summary

- Free tier: tools/list, help, account_balance — no charge, ever
- Paid tools: $0.10 (CVE lookup) to $2.00 (vuln scan) per call
- No subscription, no monthly minimum, no commitment

## Founder

Andrew Stafford. 25 years in tech (Amazon, NASA, NetApp, Veradigm). Two startup exits. Solo founder; recruiting cybersecurity operations co-founder.
